usage: Topbar and login-derived brand logo independent screenshot icon; cropped to the inner shield/emblem only, with the outer hologram shield frame and surrounding glow removed.

source.mask: polygon alpha mask follows the inner shield outline; outer shield frame, hologram glow, grid texture outside the inner shield and bottom light column are removed
source.policy: independent icon/emblem only; no full page, panel, form, background or business diagram is used as a page resource

integration: web/ui/src/layouts/AppShell.tsx uses the @3x variant as the AppShell topbar brand logo so the visible logo is the login-page inner shield only.
